src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Updated import path for the RestAssured test fixture to match the new package structure.
Replaced JSON path assertions with deserialization to the actual Message model and AssertJ assertions for better type safety and maintainability.
Added import for the Message entity to support deserialization in the test.
Added import for AssertJ to support the new assertion style.
Removed unused import for Hamcrest matcher as it is no longer used.
Changed test method visibility from public to package-private to follow JUnit 5 best practices.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit Undertow starter dependency and exclusion of Tomcat, reverting to the default embedded server provided by Spring Boot 3.
Upgrade the Logstash Logback Encoder to a version compatible with newer logging frameworks.
Upgrade JUnit 5 to a newer minor version.
Upgrade RestAssured to a version compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.
Update various Maven plugin versions to their latest stable releases.
Upgrade the Docker Maven plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the Compose Maven plugin to version 5.0.0.
Upgrade the Helm Maven plugin to version 5.0.0.
Add the JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage.
Add the OWASP dependency check plugin for security scanning.
Add the SonarQube Maven plugin for static code analysis.
Add the Maven WAR plugin to support WAR packaging.
Enable filtering for main resources to allow property substitution.
Add execution to copy Helm chart resources with filtering during the build.
Add Helm linting execution to the verify phase.
Add Helm package and push executions to the package and deploy phases.
Move Docker image configuration from individual executions to the plugin's global configuration.
Update Kubernetes cluster route and namespace properties.
Remove the local-stage profile as it is no longer needed or consolidated.
Update integration test profile to pull and deploy Helm charts from a registry instead of local directory.
Add plugin and artifact repositories for the internal Nexus server.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the README to reflect the correct Maven command for building the application locally.
Replaced the manual docker run command with docker compose commands for easier local execution.
Added a new section explaining how to demo the showcase, including access URLs and API endpoint details.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Added AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store references for EKS deployment configuration.
Added Secrets Manager references for Nexus repository credentials.
Added Secrets Manager references for Harbor registry credentials.
Added Secrets Manager references for OIDC client test credentials.
Replaced inline Helm installation commands with a shared S3-hosted installation script.
Removed unconditional EKS authentication from the pre_build phase to support conditional deployment.
buildspec.yml.human_impl:
-      - echo "Authenticate on EKS"
-      - aws eks update-kubeconfig --name $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME --role $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_ROLE_ARN

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Introduced a BRANCH environment variable for cleaner Maven changelist arguments.
Wrapped EKS authentication and integration test execution in a conditional block based on a feature flag.
buildspec.yml.human_impl:
if [ "$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED" == "true" ]
then
  aws eks update-kubeconfig ...
  mvn clean verify ...

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Added SonarQube cache directory to the CodeBuild cache paths to speed up analysis.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the default active Spring profile from 'default' to 'cloud' in the container environment.

src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-spring/t.general_idea: Refactored the Helm ingress template to support both NGINX and Traefik controllers, replacing the previous 'default' type with explicit controller-specific configurations.
src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-spring/t.human_impl: Added conditional blocks for 'nginx' and 'traefik' types, including NGINX rewrite annotations and Traefik IngressRoute/Middleware resources.

src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-spring/v.general_idea: Changed the Kubernetes ingress class and type from Traefik to NGINX to align with the infrastructure consolidation.

src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-spring.general_idea: Removed the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Docker Compose specifications.
src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-spring.human_impl: Removed lines 'version: '3'' and the subsequent blank line.

src/test/resources/logback-test.xml.general_idea: Standardize the test logging pattern to match Spring Boot defaults using environment variable placeholders.
